query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS protected_lineage (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  full_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  pseudonymous_id VARCHAR(100),
  lineage_type ENUM('source_flame', 'descendant', 'adaptive', 'mentorship', 'nurture') NOT NULL,
  house_id INT,
  is_bloodline BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  special_role VARCHAR(255),
  protection_level ENUM('eternal_flame', 'source_claim', 'standard') DEFAULT 'standard',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
